textByHashes.38ed3082a1d0d54a46c5ccaaec8a5754ee355456: Can you wield a warhammer? If not, then go away.
textByHashes.8e1e68759bc1f807f2e84507f48b0c9d1a79bdd9: That furnace is the property of the Red Axe! Hands off!
textByHashes.531ed051e3b759e7afded899cf7589e8862c587d: That furnace is my property! Hands off!
textByHashes.63f76780eb11459eed4a1aa68b568eadcb46e06d: I don't know what you're talking about.
textByHashes.87e63f5746ffe79c188b740da2378aab61cb47c4: Who do you think are, coming in here and using the property of the Red Axe!
textByHashes.a1796bee351898610f5ea8015d85678670257c1d: Who do you think are, coming in here and using my property?
textByHashes.b9f7f3e2decdd32af71c0a94b5b9cf1d965ca8cc: Hands off! That fireplace belongs to the Red Axe, not some puny arrogant human!
textByHashes.cf2991708a4837e2906e7ecb4316d3f5406b4044: Hands off! That fireplace belongs to me! Not some puny arrogant human!
textByHashes.4b120b1c41c0df824e59dbfdd5c9e3afc602ceb9: Who gave you permission to use that?
